description_long: This sculpture depicts a dramatic scene of multiple human figures carrying a horizontal body atop their shoulders, suggesting a procession or ritual. The figures are intricately detailed, with expressive faces and draped garments, each contributing to the sense of collective effort and solemnity. The base is polygonal, providing stability and a sense of groundedness to the composition. The figures are arranged in a tight cluster, with some reaching outward and others supporting the central body, creating a dynamic interplay of movement and emotion. The material appears to be weathered stone or bronze with a greenish patina, giving the sculpture an aged, monumental quality. The overall impression is one of communal action and reverence, likely commemorating a significant historical or cultural event.
description: A detailed, multi-figure sculpture showing a group of people carrying a body in a solemn procession, rendered in weathered stone or bronze with expressive detail.
description_view_0: A view from above and slightly to the front, highlighting the clustered arrangement of figures and the body being carried at the top.
description_view_1: A side view showing the procession in profile, with outstretched arms and the full length of the body being carried clearly visible.
description_view_2: A rear view focusing on the backs of the figures and the way they support the body, emphasizing the collective effort.
description_view_3: Another side view, mirroring view 1, but from the opposite side, showing different facial expressions and gestures among the figures.
attribute_subject_matter: group of human figures carrying a body in a procession
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated on a neutral base, suggesting it could be installed in a public urban space or park.
